---
title: "#humble-brag"
format: gfm
---


## 2021-03-03

*00:34:05 - @Aedin Culhane has joined the channel*
**Aedin Culhane** (00:34:05):
> set the channel description: Announce your contributions, awards, grants, talks, achievements,  “today I learnt”, link to your blog, package, gist, self-promotion is welcome here!  Bioconductor  “greatest hit”,  achievements. We want to celebrate your baby steps and giant leaps

*00:37:12 - @Stephanie Hicks has joined the channel*
*00:37:12 - @Vince Carey has joined the channel*
*00:37:12 - @Levi Waldron has joined the channel*
*00:37:13 - @Wolfgang Huber has joined the channel*
*00:37:13 - @saskia has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Matt Ritchie has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Simina Boca has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Sean Davis has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Susan Holmes has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Kozo Nishida has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Erica Feick has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Laurent Gatto has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Helena L. Crowell has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Charlotte Soneson has joined the channel*
*00:37:14 - @Leonardo Collado Torres has joined the channel*
*00:37:15 - @Marcel Ramos Pérez has joined the channel*
*00:37:15 - @Lori Shepherd has joined the channel*
*00:37:15 - @Aaron Lun has joined the channel*
*00:37:15 - @Martin Morgan has joined the channel*
*00:37:15 - @Qian Liu has joined the channel*
*00:37:15 - @Rafael Irizarry has joined the channel*
*00:38:43 - @Shila Ghazanfar has joined the channel*
*00:38:43 - @Michael Love has joined the channel*
*00:38:43 - @Kasper D. Hansen has joined the channel*
*00:39:33 - @Benilton S Carvalho has joined the channel*
*00:39:33 - @Yagoub Ali Ibrahim Adam has joined the channel*
*00:39:33 - @Johannes Rainer has joined the channel*
*01:14:02 - @Davide Risso has joined the channel*
*02:45:37 - @Luke Zappia has joined the channel*
*02:52:00 - @Alexander Toenges has joined the channel*
*02:56:06 - @Will Macnair has joined the channel*
*02:59:23 - @Hector Climente has joined the channel*
*03:08:57 - @Lluís Revilla has joined the channel*
*04:33:31 - @Federico Marini has joined the channel*
*04:38:56 - @Stuart Lee has joined the channel*
*05:01:09 - @Sebastian Worms has joined the channel*
*05:01:20 - @David Zhang has joined the channel*
*05:44:00 - @Kevin Blighe has joined the channel*
*06:13:46 - @Sanchit Saini has joined the channel*
*06:44:20 - @Wynn Cheung has joined the channel*
*07:53:18 - @Gabriele Sales has joined the channel*
*07:53:50 - @Lukas Weber has joined the channel*
*08:13:28 - @rohitsatyam102 has joined the channel*
*08:28:37 - @Spencer Nystrom has joined the channel*
*09:03:22 - @Jenny Drnevich has joined the channel*
*09:05:33 - @Abhijeet Sonawane has joined the channel*
*09:11:38 - @Liz Ing-Simmons has joined the channel*
*09:15:24 - @Krutika has joined the channel*
*09:22:04 - @Frederick Tan has joined the channel*
*10:26:11 - @mirna has joined the channel*
**Kevin Blighe** (18:49:03):
> Maybe I'll start it off? My first Bioconductor package,**EnhancedVolcano**, now has 110 citations (according to Google Scholar) in just over 2 years. It's never been published and doesn't even appear as a pre-print. It does somewhat piggy-back on DESeq2 though (thanks@Michael Love)
> Huge thanks to co-developers Sharmila Rana (now working at imperial College London) and Myles Lewis (Rheumatologist working in London)

**Stephanie Hicks** (19:16:27):
> That’s awesome@Kevin Blighe!

**Michael Love** (19:59:40):
> That's very awesome@Kevin Blighe-- why not preprint?

**Stephanie Hicks** (21:32:21):
> I’ll follow up with a#humble-bragfor@Ariel Hippenfrom@Casey Greene’s group! She has submitted her first R package (`miQC`) to:bioc:and posted a:biorxiv:preprint on it today. Congratulations to@Ariel Hippenand other co-authors including@Lukas Weber![https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.03.03.433798v1](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.03.03.433798v1)


## 2021-03-04

*03:45:17 - @Almut has joined the channel*
*10:28:57 - @Michael Lawrence has joined the channel*
**Aedin Culhane** (20:42:48) (in thread):
> maybe F1000 Bioconductor channel?


## 2021-03-05

*05:01:46 - @Jim Hunter has joined the channel*
*05:03:24 - @Mike Smith has joined the channel*
*11:49:47 - @Ludwig Geistlinger has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-07

*23:44:44 - @Dror Berel has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-08

*01:10:05 - @Tyrone Chen has joined the channel*
*05:38:36 - @margherita mutarelli has joined the channel*
*06:42:16 - @Pablo Rodriguez has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-11

*09:03:55 - @Kevin Stachelek has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-12

*09:30:21 - @Gwen has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-15

*05:38:10 - @Gian Marco Franceschini has joined the channel*

## 2021-03-31

*12:56:45 - @Kelly Street has joined the channel*

## 2021-04-06

*12:07:13 - @Daniela Cassol has joined the channel*

## 2021-04-13

**Lori Shepherd** (10:02:09):
> Nominations for Bioconductor 2021 Awards now Open.  See[Awards page](https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/)for more details or fill out this[nomination form](https://forms.gle/d9PyAjAw62yVKxjL8).  Self nominations accepted.  Deadline for nominations is May 31, 2021
  - Attachment (Google Docs): [Bioconductor Awards 2021](https://forms.gle/d9PyAjAw62yVKxjL8)
    > Nomination form for the Bioconductor Awards (see [https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/](https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/) for more details). Please fill out all the fields in the following sections. In the Nominator section, please provide your own contact information in case we need to contact you with any question. In the Nominee section, please indicate how the nominee provides outstanding contributions for each of the selected nomination criteria. Four awards will be given using the selected criteria as justification.


## 2021-05-11

*16:45:06 - @Megha Lal has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-22

*16:01:17 - @Moritz E. Beber has joined the channel*

## 2021-05-25

*12:19:19 - @Quang Nguyen has joined the channel*

## 2021-06-15

**Martin Morgan** (16:18:54):
> Not sure how to phrase this as a humble brag, but the American Statistical Association COPSS awards are an incredibly prestigious early career award in statistics and data science. Stephanie Hicks is a recipient[https://magazine.amstat.org/blog/2021/05/01/2021-copss-award-winners/](https://magazine.amstat.org/blog/2021/05/01/2021-copss-award-winners/). What a great honor, congratulations@Stephanie Hicks

**Davide Risso** (17:03:51):
> Congratulations@Stephanie Hicks! Very well deserved!

**Stephanie Hicks** (19:46:23):
> Thank you@Martin Morganand everyone!:heart:

**Simina Boca** (19:57:25):
> Awesome@Stephanie Hicks! So well deserved!


## 2021-06-16

**Michael Love** (03:48:05):
> Amazing! Very well deserved indeed!

**Laurent Gatto** (05:00:24):
> Congratulations !

**Sebastian Worms** (11:19:32):
> Wow, congratulations!

**Lori Shepherd** (11:20:13):
> congratulations!!


## 2021-07-21

**Aedin Culhane** (21:05:32):
> Excited our BIRS  single cell data integration workshop & hackathon was featured in  Nature[https://nature.com/articles/d41586-021-01994-w](https://nature.com/articles/d41586-021-01994-w)[…](https://t.co/r0VdXvGc9F?amp=1)The R code and  data are on github[https://github.com/BIRSBiointegration](https://github.com/BIRSBiointegration)…
> Videos, slides of talks at[https://birs.ca/events/2020/5-day-workshops/20w5197](https://birs.ca/events/2020/5-day-workshops/20w5197)[…](https://t.co/2wMVwv7nN1?amp=1)
  - Attachment (birs.ca): [20w5197: Mathematical Frameworks for Integrative Analysis of Emerging Biological Data Types (Online) | Banff International Research Station](https://www.birs.ca/events/2020/5-day-workshops/20w5197)
    > Workshop at the Banff International Research Station in Banff, Alberta between Jun 14 and Jun 19, 2020: Mathematical Frameworks for Integrative Analysis of Emerging Biological Data Types (Online).


## 2021-07-22

**Stephanie Hicks** (06:59:46):
> Congratulations@Aedin Culhane!!

*08:59:45 - @Alexander Toenges has left the channel*

## 2021-07-23

*15:53:01 - @Batool Almarzouq has joined the channel*

## 2021-08-21

**rohitsatyam102** (09:23:05):
> Yay!!@Aedin CulhaneCongratulations for winning the Best Workshop category in BioC 2021 and@Federico Marinifor GeneTonic!!:tada::tada::tada::confetti_ball::confetti_ball::confetti_ball:
  - File (JPEG): [Screenshot_2021-08-21-18-50-34-65_e307a3f9df9f380ebaf106e1dc980bb6.jpg](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F02C3TJCDEG/screenshot_2021-08-21-18-50-34-65_e307a3f9df9f380ebaf106e1dc980bb6.jpg)

**rohitsatyam102** (09:24:03) (in thread):
> I thoroughly enjoyed it and PCA was never that clear to me before!!


## 2021-08-26

**Aedin Culhane** (09:30:30) (in thread):
> So so kind. Sorry for the woeful internet connection.


## 2021-09-16

*18:35:08 - @Henry Miller has joined the channel*

## 2021-10-14

*10:24:08 - @Wolfgang Huber has left the channel*

## 2021-10-15

*11:01:06 - @Wes W has joined the channel*

## 2021-11-08

*03:27:42 - @Paula Nieto García has joined the channel*

## 2022-01-28

*11:13:14 - @Megha Lal has left the channel*

## 2022-03-15

**Lori Shepherd** (10:39:32):
> BiocAwards 2022 nomination is now open.  Please see[http://bioconductor.org/about/awards/](http://bioconductor.org/about/awards/)


## 2022-07-28

*09:46:47 - @Will t has joined the channel*

## 2022-08-11

*17:15:22 - @Rene Welch has joined the channel*

## 2022-10-31

*10:05:00 - @Chenyue Lu has joined the channel*

## 2022-12-09

*08:16:01 - @Mike Smith has left the channel*

## 2022-12-12

*17:58:45 - @Lexi Bounds has joined the channel*

## 2023-01-24

*10:49:59 - @Maria Doyle has joined the channel*
**Maria Doyle** (10:51:00):
> ICYMI we have the first instructor certified from our Bioconductor Carpentries training program:tada::simple_smile:[https://twitter.com/Bioconductor/status/1617828642029031424](https://twitter.com/Bioconductor/status/1617828642029031424)
  - Attachment (twitter): [Attachment](https://twitter.com/almeidasilvaf/status/1617824652868616196)
    > I'm proud to share that I've become a Carpentries-certified instructor thanks to a scholarship offered by [@Bioconductor](https://twitter.com/Bioconductor) :partying_face:
    > 
    > I'd like to thank [@Bioconductor](https://twitter.com/Bioconductor) for the opportunity and [@thecarpentries](https://twitter.com/thecarpentries) for the amazing training.
    > 
    > Looking forward to expanding our #education community!


## 2023-04-17

**Lori Shepherd** (14:14:36):
> Nominations for Bioconductor 2023 Awards are now open.  Bioconductor is excited to announce an opportunity to recognize those making significant outstanding contributions to the Bioconductor community. The Bioconductor project is announcing the call for Bioconductor Awards, honoring various forms of contributions to the project. Four awardees will be selected, each having contributed to the project in an outstanding way based on one or more of selection criteria. More information and details found[https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/](https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/)and the nomination form can be found at[https://forms.gle/gPzmH8ewHNHWckdv6](https://forms.gle/gPzmH8ewHNHWckdv6).  The deadline for nominations is May 31, 2023.  The awardee's will be recognized at the annual Bioc2023 conference August 2-4.
  - Attachment (Google Docs): [Bioconductor Awards 2023](https://forms.gle/gPzmH8ewHNHWckdv6)
    > Nomination form for the Bioconductor Awards (see [https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/](https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/) for more details). 
    > 
    > Please fill out all the fields in the following sections.
    > 
    > In the Nominator section, please provide your own contact information in case we need to contact you with any question.
    > 
    > In the Nominee section, please indicate how the nominee provides outstanding contributions for each of the selected nomination criteria. Four awards will be given using the selected criteria as justification.


## 2023-05-04

**Aedin Culhane** (15:09:41):
> Congrats maria[https://www.siliconrepublic.com/innovation/bioinformatics-university-limerick-maria-doyle](https://www.siliconrepublic.com/innovation/bioinformatics-university-limerick-maria-doyle)
  - Attachment (Silicon Republic): [Bioinformatics, data and the value of open science](https://www.siliconrepublic.com/innovation/bioinformatics-university-limerick-maria-doyle)
    > Dr Maria Doyle demystifies bioinformatics and explains just some of the many applications for this multidisciplinary field.


## 2023-08-03

*15:58:05 - @Ritika Giri has joined the channel*

## 2023-08-04

*10:49:00 - @Ray Su has joined the channel*

## 2023-09-07

*22:52:33 - @Roy Storey has joined the channel*

## 2023-09-15

*04:55:04 - @Leo Lahti has joined the channel*

## 2023-09-18

*09:07:10 - @Y-h. Taguchi has joined the channel*

## 2024-01-27

*04:51:29 - @atongsa miyamoto has joined the channel*

## 2024-02-21

**Maria Doyle** (07:39:18):
> :trophy:Nominate for the Bioconductor Awards 2024!:trophy:We invite you to nominate individuals making outstanding contributions to our community.
> This is your chance to honour their hard work and achievements!:star2:Criteria: Significant contributions in one or more ways to the project:busts_in_silhouette:Selection: 4 awardees based on impact:date:Deadline: May 15, 2024
> 
> Nominate Now:[Nomination Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd4Oos9TQkVKRjfjEj3LzfKJuju3TlREh6Pca_S2W77GfdUvA/viewform)Learn More:[Awards Details](https://bioconductor.org/about/awards/)Recognise their impact: Nominate someone who’s making our community better.
  - File (PNG): [BiocAwards (1).png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F06KQ9K15M4/biocawards__1_.png)

**Michael Love** (08:07:34):
> > 2023: Holmes, Ritchie, Ahlmann-Eltze, Bell
> 2022: Sean Davis, Erica Feick, Nicole Kramer, Hervé Pagès
> 2021: Aedin Culhane, Laurent Gatto, James MacDonald, Charlotte Soneson, Leonardo Collado-Torres
> 2020: Helena Crowell, Aaron Lun, Lori Shepherd, Gordon Smyth


## 2024-04-18

*15:54:20 - @Weston Elison has joined the channel*

## 2024-05-15

*08:31:27 - @Sunil Nahata has joined the channel*

## 2024-07-05

*12:29:12 - @Margherita has joined the channel*

## 2024-07-26

*19:52:18 - @Qiwen Octavia Huang has joined the channel*

## 2024-08-19

*09:41:10 - @Rema Gesaka has joined the channel*

## 2024-09-13

*18:20:27 - @Gobi Dasu has joined the channel*

## 2025-04-17

*16:17:27 - @dhvani solanki has joined the channel*
